content: Lydia: Ugh, fuckin' Soul Cairn... ridiculous place, fulla ghostly cucks who couldn’t even fight for Dibella’s love. Smells like wet death and regret. Soul: And yet here you prance around in that tiny scrap of a bra, looking like some brothel’s bargain-bin fantasy. What’s the matter, Nord cream-puff? Too scared to wear real armor in a death-realm? Lydia: Real armor slows me down when I’m cleavin’ through undead scum—or when I’m ridin’ my thane like a prize stallion. And this? This is for a woman of . Diabella blesses the bold, not the buried, you rotting husk. Soul: Bold? Ha! Bold would be admitting you’re just a glory-hole guard for that Dragonborn of yours. Bet you squeal like a skeever when he fills you proper. But hey, keep strippin’. —maybe the next reeker’ll skull-fuck you before I do.
